name: Montego Bags O' Wags Dog Treats - Marrow Bones 120g
shortDescription: Montego Bags O’ Wags Marrow Bones are nutritious and delicious dog chew treats that support healthy teeth and muscles while providing a tasty reward for dogs of all breeds and ages. Not suitable for puppies.
description: Give your dog a wagtastically delicious and nutritious treat that supports oral health! Montego BAGS O’ WAGS Dental Sticks are firm, chewtastically satisfying snacks specially crafted for adult dogs, especially larger breeds. Featuring a Delectable Beef Marrow Bones that dogs love, these treats help reduce plaque and tartar build-up, promote gum health, and freshen breath. Perfect as a daily reward, training incentive, or between-meal snack, they complement any Montego dry or wet food diet. Key Features: Flavour: Delectable Beef Marrow Bones Size & Weight: Convenient 120g single-serving packs Dental Benefits: Helps clean teeth, reduce tartar, and support healthy gums Versatile Use: Ideal for training, rewarding good behaviour, or daily snacks Complements Montego Diets: Perfect alongside Montego dry or wet food meals Ingredients & Nutritional Info: Corn starch, chicken meal, water, glycerine, propylene glycol, sugars, wheat gluten, spray-‎dried animal plasma, poultry fat, sodium phosphates, fish oil‎‎.‎ ADDITIVES (/kg): SENSORY: Palatability meat-based enhancers with beef aroma, white and brown colourants; PRESERVATIVES: Potassium sorbate. Nutrient Amount Crude Protein 20% Total Fat 5% Crude Fibre 1% Moisture 18.5% Calcium 1% Phosphorus 0.8% Sugars 3% Metabolizable Energy 330kcal/100 g Treat your dog to a healthy chew that’s full of yummy goodness and supports their smile every day!
